'''βàöth-ng-b-b''' ('''kathangbeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberduck|rubberduck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberduck|rubberduck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöth-ng-b-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathangbeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangbeboko|thithangbeboko]] || [[word:jithangbeboko|jithangbeboko]] || [[word:shithangbeboko|shithangbeboko]] || [[word:kithangbeboko|kithangbeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangbeboko|thuthuthangbeboko]] || [[word:jujuthangbeboko|jujuthangbeboko]] || [[word:shushuthangbeboko|shushuthangbeboko]] || [[word:kukuthangbeboko|kukuthangbeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthangbeboko|thuthangbeboko]] || [[word:juthangbeboko|juthangbeboko]] || [[word:shuthangbeboko|shuthangbeboko]] || [[word:kuthangbeboko|kuthangbeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangbeboko|thothangbeboko]] || [[word:jothangbeboko|jothangbeboko]] || [[word:shothangbeboko|shothangbeboko]] || [[word:kothangbeboko|kothangbeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangbeboko|thothangbeboko]] || [[word:jothangbeboko|jothangbeboko]] || [[word:shothangbeboko|shothangbeboko]] || [[word:kothangbeboko|kothangbeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠthangbeboko|thΟΠthangbeboko]] || [[word:jΟΠthangbeboko|jΟΠthangbeboko]] || [[word:shΟΠthangbeboko|shΟΠthangbeboko]] || [[word:kΟΠthangbeboko|kΟΠthangbeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangbeboko|thathangbeboko]] || [[word:jathangbeboko|jathangbeboko]] || [[word:shathangbeboko|shathangbeboko]] || [[word:kathangbeboko|kathangbeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangbeboko|thathangbeboko]] || [[word:jathangbeboko|jathangbeboko]] || [[word:shathangbeboko|shathangbeboko]] || [[word:kathangbeboko|kathangbeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathangbebithi|shathangbebithi]] || [[word:shathangbebiji|shathangbebiji]] || [[word:shathangbebishi|shathangbebishi]] || [[word:shathangbebiki|shathangbebiki]]
